headline: Wall Street's Insights Into Key Metrics Ahead of ResMed (RMD) Q3 Earnings
summary: Besides Wall Street's top-and-bottom-line estimates for ResMed (RMD), review projections for some of its key metrics to gain a deeper understanding of how the company might have fared during the quarter ended March 2026.

headline: Sleep Apnea Devices (Therapeutic, Diagnostic) Market Report 2026-2034 Featuring Key Players - ResMed, Koninklijke Philips, and Carefusion
summary: The global sleep apnea devices market is projected to expand from USD 7.95 billion in 2025 to USD 14.68 billion by 2034, growing at a CAGR of 7.05%. This growth is driven by a rising prevalence of sleep apnea, awareness of sleep disorders, obesity rates, and technological advancements in devices like CPAP, BiPAP, and oral appliances across home and clinical settings.
